b:T4c6e,<div class="specification">
<p>The refractive index of glass decreases with increasing wavelength. The diagram shows rays of light incident on a converging lens made of glass. The light is a mixture of red and blue light.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>On the diagram, draw lines to show the rays after they have refracted through the lens. Label the refracted red rays with the letter R and the refracted blue rays with the letter B.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Suggest how the refracted rays in (a) are modified when the converging lens is replaced by a diverging lens.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Hence state how the defect of the converging lens in (a) may be corrected.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.ii.</div>
</div>c:T4748,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>each incident ray shown splitting into two ✔</p>
<p>each pair symmetrically intersecting each other on principal axis ✔</p>
<p>for red, intersection further to the right ✔</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p><em>For MP3, at least one of the rays must be labelled.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>rays diverge after passing through lens</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>the extension of the rays will intersect the principal axis on the side of incident rays/as if they were coming from the focal point/points in the left side/OWTTE ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>by placing a diverging lens next to the converging lens</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>make an achromatic doublet ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.ii.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/c/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","c"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.SL.TZ0.8"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","c-1-introduction-to-imaging"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.i.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.ii.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
